title: WhiteRose 16x
description: texturepack that aims to bring 1.8.9 vibe to newer version
body:
Clean PvP-style pack focused on better visuals and clarity

# Hello!



I created this texture pack to bring back the classic 1.8.9 vibe to newer Minecraft versions while still keeping things clean. ✨ The goal is to keep the older PvP feel many players like, but make it work nicely with the latest versions of the game.

**This texturepack is made for:**
- BedWars
- Bridge
- SkyWars
- base texturepack for Hypixel SkyBlock
- any PVP in general

This is also my first texture pack, so I’m still learning and improving things as I go. Any feedback, suggestions, or support would really mean a lot to me! ❤️ I plan to keep updating the pack, improving textures, and making sure it stays compatible with new Minecraft versions.

_If you send a cool screenshot from the texture pack or report any issues (like color mismatching, etc.) to jiricek6392, you’ll get a custom splash text in the main menu!_

## Current features:

🌌 Custom sky for [Nuit](https://modrinth.com/mod/nuit) and [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home)￼
🌃 Darker endstone blocks
🖼️ Custom HD paintings
🖥️ Custom main menu
🧱 Smoother block textures for a cleaner look
🛠️ Retextured tools inspired by classic PvP packs
🔥 Custom fire
➕ Multiple PvP elements
📂 Custom inventories
🌿 Various subtle visual tweaks: unobtrusive blocks, lower grass, removed water overlay, thinner kelp & seagrass, and more
➕ Small visual improvements and tweaks

_this texturepack is only in beta and will get more content/improvements over time_
